scripts.test:store: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/session-store.test.ts tests/session-startup-hydration.test.ts tests/thread-titles.test.ts tests/sidebar-groups.test.ts tests/thread-export.test.ts tests/preview-runtime-keys.test.ts
scripts.test:settings: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/settings-store.test.ts tests/settings-appearance-rendering.test.tsx tests/agent-avatar.test.tsx tests/worker-retry.test.tsx tests/worker-run-lifecycle.test.ts && node tests/agent-schedule-models.test.mjs
scripts.test:assistant-stream: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/assistant-stream-grouping.test.ts tests/assistant-stream-summary.test.ts tests/attachment-input.test.ts tests/attachment-wire.test.ts tests/request-body.test.ts tests/hot-swap.test.ts tests/mcp-apps.test.ts tests/preview-activity.test.ts tests/turn-events.test.ts tests/turn-queue.test.ts tests/turn-prompt.test.ts tests/turn-runtime.test.ts tests/turn-stream.test.ts
scripts.test:ui-preferences: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/ui-preferences-store.test.ts tests/interface-sounds.test.ts tests/shortcuts.test.ts tests/composer-autocomplete.test.ts tests/composer-tokens.test.ts tests/composer-history.test.ts tests/chat-scroll.test.ts tests/chat-search.test.ts tests/command-palette.test.ts tests/context-menu.test.ts tests/recent-threads.test.ts tests/sidebar-recency.test.ts tests/quick-summary.test.ts tests/workspace-launcher.test.ts
scripts.test:api-models: node tests/api-models.test.mjs && node tests/api-model-discovery.test.mjs && node tests/api-model-startup.test.mjs && node tests/inspector-controller.test.mjs
scripts.test:git-refresh: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/git-refresh.test.ts tests/empty-starter-suggestions.test.ts tests/git-diff-renderer.test.ts tests/git-commit-message-models.test.ts tests/turn-workspace.test.ts tests/turn-changes-card.test.tsx
scripts.test:media: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/generated-media-rendering.test.tsx && cargo test --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml -p milim-server media_
scripts.test:artifacts: node tests/run-ts-test.mjs tests/artifacts.test.ts tests/artifact-visibility.test.ts tests/markdown-rendering.test.tsx tests/preview-panel-rendering.test.tsx && node tests/run-tauri-rust-test.mjs artifact_
scripts.verify:release: npm run package:release && npm run release:portable && npm run release:manifest && npm run verify:release-manifest && npm run verify:release-launch
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test:copy && npm run test:brand-cleanup && npm run test:selectors && npm run test:store && npm run test:settings && npm run test:assistant-stream && npm run test:context-compaction && npm run test:reasoning && npm run test:ui-preferences && npm run test:onboarding && npm run test:user-state-storage && npm run test:update && npm run test:api-models && npm run test:git-refresh && npm run test:media && npm run test:mobile-companion && npm run test:artifacts && npm run test:computer-use && npm run verify:release-workflow && npm run test:tauri-config
scripts.verify:tauri-webview: npm run verify:tauri && npm run test:tauri-webview
scripts.verify:tester-ready: npm run verify && npm run verify:release && npm run verify:tauri-webview
